channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: The Director of ‘Hoppers’ Was Sure He’d Have to Cut Its Most Shocking Moment
item.description: Daniel Chong was ready to cut the scene, until Pixar legends Pete Docter and Andrew Stanton stepped in.

item.title: Valve doesn't sound confident the Steam Machine will ship in 2026
item.description: As part of a Year in Review blog detailing changes Valve made to Steam in 2025, the company shared a minor update on its hardware plans that doesn't sound good for anyone hoping to buy a Steam Machine, Steam Controller or Steam Frame in 2026. Specifically, the company is now opening up the possibility its new hardware won't ship this year at all.In February, when Valve acknowledged the ongoing memory and storage shortage had delayed the launch of its hardware and could lead to higher prices, the company was still committing to a (fairly wide) window of when its hardware would ship: "Our goal o...

item.title: 'Like a half-molted lobster': MSI redefines what an all-in-one PC is with a barebone PC that includes a 13.3-inch touchscreen, RTX 5080X, and a weird PS3-esque appendage
item.description: MSI’s Vision X AI combines high-end hardware, an interactive touchscreen, and a lobster-like chassis for both gamers and professional creators.

item.title: US Data Centers Could Require as Much Water as New York City by 2030, Study Shows
item.description: AI’s projected water demand will create major problems not just for the average American, but for the industry itself.

item.title: The 3 best mini food processors — compact choppers tested and recommended by a kitchen tech expert
item.description: Don't let a compact kitchen or a small budget hold you back — these tiny food processors pack real power into a tiny space.

item.title: Life EV officially owns Rad Power Bikes now
item.description: The Rad Power brand is expected to live on.

item.title: Tesla Clears Model 3 Inventory in Canada Ahead of the Arrival of Chinese EVs: Report
item.description: Tesla is already looking to take advantage of lower Canadian tariffs on Chinese EVs.

item.title: Dunk and Tanselle Could Reunite If ‘A Knight of the Seven Kingdoms’ Goes Beyond the Books
item.description: Star Peter Claffey has hopes the very tall pair might meet again if the show gets more seasons.

item.title: 72 'Buy It for Life' Products: Cast-Iron, Tools, Speakers, Chairs, and More
item.description: From cast-iron pans to mechanical watches, we’ve rounded up products that are made to last for decades.

item.title: Valve’s Steam Machine may not launch this year
item.description: Valve still can't reveal details about the Steam Machine, Steam Frame, and Steam Controller launch dates, which were originally scheduled for early 2026. In a new post, the company now says "we hope to ship in 2026" due to the ongoing shortages of memory and storage chips, but that timeline sounds like quite a downgrade […]

item.title: Netflix's version of Overcooked lets you play as Huntr/x
item.description: Netflix's library of streamable party games is expanding today with a custom version of Overcooked! All You Can Eat. Netflix launched its cloud gaming program with games like Lego Party and Tetris Time Warp, but Overcooked feels a bit unique because it features a roster of Netflix-affiliated characters from KPop Demon Hunters and Stranger Things.For the uninitiated, Overcooked plays like a more manic version of Diner Dash, where teams attempt to prepare food together in increasingly elaborate kitchens filled with obstacles. The original version of Overcooked! All You Can Eat was released in 20...

item.title: Everyone was mad at the Galaxy S26 Ultra — but Samsung just told us why it's all been a big misunderstanding
item.description: The Galaxy S26 Ultra recently found itself at the center of an controversy about its screen specs — but Samsung's now explained what happened.

item.title: 24 hours with the MacBook Air M5 — it's already faster than the M4 MacBook Air
item.description: We unboxed the MacBook Air M5 and instantly put it to the test — and now we have the first benchmark numbers.

item.title: The Curious Case of the Block ‘AI Layoffs’
item.description: So was it AI or not?

item.title: Grammarly is using our identities without permission
item.description: Grammarly's "expert review" feature offers to give users writing advice "inspired by" subject matter experts, including recently deceased professors, as Wired reported on Wednesday. When I tried the feature out myself, I found some experts that came as a surprise for a different reason - one of them was my boss. The AI-generated feedback included […]...

item.title: A Brain-Invading Worm Spread By Rats and Snails Has Reached California
item.description: Researchers have found evidence the rat lungworm is now endemic in southern California

item.title: Motorola quietly teams up with GrapheneOS to deliver true business smartphones with a supersafe version of Android, but it won't happen anytime soon
item.description: Motorola partners with GrapheneOS to advance business smartphone security while expanding enterprise analytics and privacy tools for professional organizations.
